title: Resources for Small Businesses
text:
Downloadable Resources
MDA Contract Clauses
This PDF document provides a list of Missile Defense Agency clauses which may be used in MDA solicitations and contracts. Each clause has a prescription — guidance that indicates how and when the clause or provision is to be used.
A thorough understanding of the terms and conditions contained in these clauses will be helpful for any contractor doing business with MDA.
An awareness of the following clauses is particularly useful:
H-09 Organizational Conflicts of Interest
H-20 Sensitive Information Technology Work
H-27 Foreign Persons
H-28 Distribution Control of Technical Information
Online Resources
Doing Business with the Department of Defense (DoD) U.S.(external link opens in new window)
